title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at JLL India

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at JLL India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? JLL India in Kochi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About JLL India:
JLL India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JLL India!
